mapper.select: select g.ledger_id as ledgerId, g.change_type as changeType, g.source_type as sourceType, g.source_ref_id as sourceRefId, g.growth_change as growthChange, g.balance_after as balanceAfter, g.level_before as levelBefore, g.level_after as levelAfter, g.remark, g.create_time as createTime from jst_growth_ledger g inner join jst_points_account a on a.account_id = g.account_id and a.del_flag = '0' where g.del_flag = '0' and a.owner_id = #{userId} and a.owner_type in ('user', 'student') order by g.create_time desc, g.ledger_id desc
